FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Infrastructure Boom
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your settlement's growing prosperity has attracted a wave of builders, engineers, and craftspeople from across the region. They're eager to work and have the skills to make lasting improvements. Where should you direct their efforts?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Build more housing. A larger workforce is our greatest asset.
Improve roads and logistics. Faster construction across the board.
Construct a proper market district. Trade is the lifeblood of growth.
We do it all. Housing, roads, AND markets. Spare no expense.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: New Housing District
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: New residential blocks rise quickly under the skilled builders' hands. The expanded housing attracts more settlers and workers, permanently increasing the settlement's population capacity.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Improved Logistics
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: New roads, warehouses, and supply depots streamline the flow of materials. Construction projects that once took months can now be completed in weeks. The efficiency gains are permanent.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Market District Built
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A proper market district takes shape, complete with stalls, storage, and trading posts. Merchants begin arriving regularly, and the settlement's tax revenue sees a permanent increase from the improved commercial activity.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Ambitious Expansion
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Under your expansionist vision, the builders tackle everything at once. New housing, improved roads, and a bustling market district emerge simultaneously. The investment is steep, but the results transform the settlement permanently.
